title: Telnyx Toll-Free Verification queue — 4 Vrtl Pirates tickets pending
html:
telnyx dashboard ($9.57 credit) showing four Toll-Free Verification tickets for Vrtl Pirates all "Waiting for Customer / Vendor" — each rejected for the same CTIA-compliance reasons (website completeness, opt-in screenshot, STOP/HELP disclosures). Two weeks of back-and-forth and the SMS channel for outpace is still not live.

TL;DR

  • Four sequential telnyx toll-free SMS verification rejections for vrtl pirates across Oct 21 → Nov 4 — all CTIA-related.
  • Single root cause: opt-in form on vrtlpirates.com missing standard SMS disclosures (use case, data rates, frequency, STOP, HELP, privacy).
  • This blocks the outpace iMessage/SMS leaderboard channel entirely and drains vrtl pirates working capital ($9.57 left on Telnyx).

telnyx · vrtl pirates · outpace · ctia compliance · toll free verification · infra blockers
